---
title: "__SPEC_TITLE__"
subtitle: "Comprehension gate · computable phenotype"
date: today
format:
  html:
    theme: spec-theme.scss
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 2
    toc-title: "Contenido"
    embed-resources: true
    number-sections: false
    code-tools: false
execute:
  eval: false
---

<!--
  Spec render template (datavidence). The skill COPIES this file to
  <spec-dir>/index.qmd with spec-theme.scss and the section files, fills every
  __PLACEHOLDER__ and the executive summary, then: quarto render index.qmd

  HEADING RULE (critical — avoids the tabset collision):
    * This file owns the structure: `##` = chapter, `###` = a short tab name.
    * Every INCLUDED section file uses `####`+ ONLY (never #, ##, ###) — its long
      descriptive title is a `####` line in its own body. A `##`/`###` inside an
      include would become a stray extra tab.
  (Plain .qmd, not .jinja: Quarto {{< include >}} must survive copier verbatim.)
-->

::: {.exec-summary}
## Resumen ejecutivo  <span class="status-badge __STATUS_CLASS__">__STATUS_LABEL__</span>

__ONE_PARAGRAPH_RESTATEMENT__

**Decisión (resumen):**

```
__DECISION_DIAGRAM_ASCII__
```

**Decisiones locales abiertas — bloquean el código:**

::: {.pending-list}
- [ ] `PENDING_LOCAL_DECISION` — __open_decision_1__
- [ ] `PENDING_LOCAL_DECISION` — __open_decision_2__
:::

> El código ejecutable (R/SQL) se **retiene** hasta sign-off humano explícito; el
> pseudocódigo agnóstico de la pestaña *Pseudocódigo* es parte del diseño revisable.
:::

## Comprensión

::: {.panel-tabset}

### Restatement
{{< include comprehension/01-restatement.md >}}

### Ejemplos
{{< include comprehension/02-worked-examples.md >}}

### Contraejemplos
{{< include comprehension/03-counter-examples.md >}}

### Decisión
{{< include comprehension/04-decision-diagram.md >}}

### Tiempo
{{< include comprehension/05-timelines.md >}}

### Estados
{{< include comprehension/06-granularity-states.md >}}

:::

## Hacia el código

::: {.panel-tabset}

### Variables
{{< include build/variables.md >}}

### Pseudocódigo
{{< include build/pseudocode.md >}}

### Pendientes
{{< include build/pending-decisions.md >}}

:::

## Validación
{{< include validation/validation-plan.md >}}

<!-- After human sign-off: append a `code/` tab (the real R/SQL) + tests/, and
     flip the status badge to LOCKED. -->
